item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: TPRM CHALLENGES IN THE FACE OF IVANTI ICS, CACTI, SONICWALL, CONFLUENCE, AND CITRIX VULNERABILITIES
item.description: Focus Friday: Learn more about recent the cyber breaches and critical vulnerabilities from Black Kite.

item.title: Focus Friday: Lessons from the CrowdStrike Update Outage on Global IT Resilience
item.description: Learn more about the CrowdStrike update outage from a Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) perspective and immediate steps to protect your supply chain.

item.title: CrowdStrike Outage: Lessons on Fragility and Resilience
item.description: Lessons learned from the CrowdStrike outage, its shocking impact on society, and the crucial reminder of the third-party risk problem.

item.title: Black Kite’s Data and Intelligence Sets a New Standard in Forrester Wave™ Cybersecurity Risk Ratings
item.description: Need better data and intelligence to run your third-party risk management program? See how Black Kite sets the bar higher.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: TPRM INSIGHTS INTO CRITICAL VULNERABILITIES IN MICROSOFT WINDOWS, SOLARWINDS WHD, ZIMBRA, AND EXCHANGE SERVER
item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: TPRM INSIGHTS INTO DAHUA NVR4, JENKINS CLASSLOADERPROXY, AND ZABBIX VULNERABILITIES WITH BLACK KITE’S FOCUSTAGS™
item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: BLACK KITE BRIDGE™ ENABLES INDUSTRY-FIRST RISK COLLABORATION ACROSS VENDOR ECOSYSTEM
item.description: Introducing Black Kite Bridge — an industry-first platform enabling real-time risk collaboration across vendor ecosystems.

item.title: Black Kite Achieves SOC 2 – Type 2 Compliance
item.description: Black Kite attains SOC 2 Type 2 compliance, underscoring its commitment to data security, operational integrity, and third-party risk trust.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: TPRM INSIGHTS INTO THE PAN-OS CLEARTEXT VULNERABILITY & A SNEAK PEEK INTO WHAT’S NEXT
item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we continue to explore high-profile cybersecurity incidents through the lens of Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: TPRM INSIGHTS ON GOGS, INTERNET EXPLORER, DOCKER AUTHZ, AND JumpServer VULNERABILITIES
item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: Our RiskBusters Bust the TPRM Myth that You Can’t See Nth-Party Risks
item.description: Our RiskBusters debunk the myth that TPRM cannot see beyond third parties and explain the importance of Nth-party risk visibility. Learn more today.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: TPRM INSIGHTS ON VMWARE ESXi AUTHENTICATION BYPASS VULNERABILITY
item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: Don’t Wait for Ransomware: RiskBusters Shows How to See It Coming
item.description: Are ransomware attacks completely random, or is there a way to predict where they will strike next? RiskBusters™ has the answer.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: MANAGING THIRD-PARTY RISKS FROM DAHUA IP CAMERA, SONICWALL FIREWALL, AND WPML, FILECATALYST WORKFLOW VULNERABILITIES WITH BLACK KITE’S FOCUSTAGS™
item.description: This week's Focus Friday blog we delve into high-profile cybersecurity incidents with a critical eye on Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM).

item.title: Three New Solutions from Black Kite Automate Compliance of Third-Party Cyber Assessments with Industry’s First Cyber-Aware AI Engine
item.description: Discover Black Kite’s three new solutions that automate third-party cyber assessments with the industry’s first Cyber-Aware AI engine.

item.title: Ransomware Review February 2025: Clop’s CLEO Attack Pushes Victim Count to Historic High
item.description: Learn about February’s ransomware activity: a record 809 victims, Clop's CLEO attack peaks, 8Base shutdown, and essential defense insights.

item.title: BLACK KITE RESEARCH REVEALS TRADITIONAL APPROACHES TO VULNERABILITY MANAGEMENT FALL SHORT IN THIRD-PARTY RISK MANAGEMENT (TPRM)
item.description: New research from Black Kite shows traditional vulnerability management falls short for third-party risk — and what to do next.

item.title: How to Prioritize Vulnerabilities in Your Supply Chain: A Proven Approach to Cut Through the Noise
item.description: Overwhelmed by CVEs? Learn a proven 3D approach to prioritize supply chain vulnerabilities beyond severity. Watch our video and read the report.

item.title: BLACK KITE UNVEILS VULNERABILITY INTELLIGENCE BRIEFS TO PROVIDE VISIBILITY INTO THIRD-PARTY VULNERABILITY RISKS
item.description: Discover how Black Kite’s Vulnerability Intelligence Briefs offer visibility into third-party vulnerability risks and enhance security decision-making

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Insights Into SysAid, ActiveMQ, Webmin, and Couchbase Server Vulnerabilities
item.description: Explore critical vulnerabilities in SysAid, ActiveMQ, Webmin, and Couchbase Server through a TPRM lens. Learn how to identify and manage vendor risks.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Insights Into Fortinet Backdoors, SonicWall SSLVPN, and Redis DoS Vulnerabilities
item.description: Understand the TPRM impact of the Fortinet backdoor, SonicWall SSLVPN DoS, and Redis DoS vulnerabilities. Actionable insights from a TPRM perspective.

item.title: Infographic: Key Stats from the 2025 Third-Party Breach Report
item.description: Get the essential numbers from the 2025 Third-Party Breach Report. See the biggest trends, attack methods, and impacts in one infographic.

item.title: Infographic: Takeaways from the 8 Most Noteworthy Cyber Incidents of 2024
item.description: Discover 2024’s biggest cyber incidents and how they disrupted third-party cyber ecosystems.

item.title: Your Friendly Neighborhood Ransomware Syndicate Will See You Now
item.description: Discover how LockBit ran ransomware like a business before getting hacked themselves. Understand the implications for TPRM.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Perspectives On Ivanti Connect Secure, FortiSwitch, and MinIO Vulnerabilities
item.description: Understand the TPRM implications of Ivanti, FortiSwitch, and MinIO vulnerabilities. Get vendor questions and remediation steps. Read our analysis now!

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: THIRD-PARTY RISKS FROM ADOBE COLDFUSION AND BEEGO XSS VULNERABILITIES
item.description: Understand the TPRM implications of Adobe ColdFusion and Beego XSS vulnerabilities. Get vendor questions and remediation steps. Read our analysis now!

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Approach to SAP NetWeaver VCFRAMEWORK RCE and Apache Tomcat HTTP/2 DoS and Rewrite-Rule Bypass
item.description: Learn TPRM implications of SAP NetWeaver RCE (CVE-2025-31324) and Apache Tomcat DoS/bypass (CVE-2025-31650/51) along with remediation guidance.

item.title: EY US UNVEILS PAUL PAGET OF BLACK KITE AS AN ENTREPRENEUR OF THE YEAR® 2025 NEW ENGLAND AWARD FINALIST
item.description: Paul Paget, CEO of Black Kite, is named a finalist for EY US’s prestigious Entrepreneur of the Year 2025 New England award.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: Addressing the PHP-CGI, Microsoft MSMQ, and Rejetto HFS Vulnerabilities: A TPRM Approach
item.description: Welcome to this week’s Focus Friday, where we delve into critical vulnerabilities that are reshaping Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) practices.

item.title: What We Learned at RSAC 2024
item.description: Black Kite SVP and Cyber Risk Evangelist Jeffrey Wheatman shares takeaways from RSAC 2024. Read more from the cybersecurity conference.
